event: transferred to tertiary care referral center
admitted for acute idiopathic necrotizing pancreatitis
transferred to surgical intensive care unit
resuscitation with crystalloid and blood transfusions
unenhanced CT showed subcapsular and perihepatic collections
transfusion of 5 units packed red blood cells
transfusion of 2 units fresh frozen plasma
contrast-enhanced CT showed increased hematoma size
multiple punctate areas of contrast extravasation
concern for liver failure due to mass effect
unable to suction or morcellate hematoma
